channel.title: Prank on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Prank on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Hoaxes Related to Unidentified Flying Objects
item.description:
Numerous hoaxes related to the study of unidentified flying objects have been perpetrated throughout history. These include practical jokes like a balloon with a burning basket in 1897 and a turkey vulture with a burning cotton ball, which led to a school fire. Other hoaxes involved fabricated accounts of airships, such as one where a cow was reportedly lifted by a ship, and the controversial “alien autopsy” film footage that was later revealed to be a hoax. Photographic hoaxes, like those of George Adamski and a purported alien at Ilkley Moor, have also been exposed.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_UFO-related_hoaxes
